prompt: Blocker-depth setup: tap left hole card (As).
why_v1: Hole-card anchor keeps hand reference stable before stack-depth action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. As is the hole-card anchor because that exact blocker removes strong continues and gives the pressure line real leverage.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The ace of spades is the right anchor here because that exact blocker removes strong continuing hands and decides whether the pressure line has real blocker value.
